fa-location.appearanceId: teardrop or balloon-shaped map pin with a hollow circle or dot in the center body; inverted teardrop pin silhouette with a rounded top and pointed base
fa-location.functionalityId: marks a geographic location on a map; indicates a specific point of interest or address
fa-location.intentId: identify or share a location on a map; navigate to or pin a specific geographic point

fa-location-arrow.appearanceId: teardrop balloon pin shape with a right-pointing directional arrow overlaid in the center body; inverted teardrop pin silhouette with an inward arrow badge
fa-location-arrow.functionalityId: navigates to or points toward a specific location; indicates directional movement toward a pinned destination
fa-location-arrow.intentId: navigate or get directions to a pinned map location; show movement toward a specific destination

fa-location-arrow-up.appearanceId: teardrop balloon pin shape with an upward-pointing arrow overlaid in the center body; inverted teardrop pin silhouette with an upward arrow badge inside
fa-location-arrow-up.functionalityId: indicates upward navigation or elevation at a pinned location; directs movement upward from a mapped point
fa-location-arrow-up.intentId: navigate upward or indicate an elevated route from a location; show vertical direction or floor level at a pinned point

fa-location-check.appearanceId: teardrop balloon pin shape with a checkmark overlaid in the center body; inverted teardrop pin silhouette with a tick mark badge inside
fa-location-check.functionalityId: confirms or verifies a location as checked in or validated; marks a destination as visited or approved
fa-location-check.intentId: check in at a location or confirm a destination visit; mark a geographic point as verified or completed

fa-location-circle.appearanceId: teardrop balloon pin shape containing a smaller filled or outlined circle in the center body; inverted teardrop pin silhouette with a circular badge overlaid inside
fa-location-circle.functionalityId: marks a location with a circular indicator or radius zone; indicates a pinned point within a circular coverage area
fa-location-circle.intentId: define or display a location with a circular boundary or range; indicate a point within a coverage or service zone

fa-location-dot.appearanceId: teardrop balloon pin shape with a solid filled dot centered in the lower body; standard map pin silhouette with a prominent center dot marker
fa-location-dot.functionalityId: marks an exact geographic point on a map; pins a specific address or coordinate
fa-location-dot.intentId: pin or identify a precise location on a map; share or navigate to a specific address or coordinate

fa-location-dot-slash.appearanceId: teardrop balloon pin shape with a center dot and a diagonal slash line crossing through the entire pin; standard map pin silhouette with a cancellation stroke overlaid
fa-location-dot-slash.functionalityId: removes or disables a pinned location; indicates a location is unavailable or turned off
fa-location-dot-slash.intentId: remove or deactivate a location pin on a map; indicate that location services are disabled or a point is unavailable

fa-location-exclamation.appearanceId: teardrop balloon pin shape with an exclamation mark overlaid in the center body; inverted teardrop pin silhouette with a vertical exclamation badge inside
fa-location-exclamation.functionalityId: flags a location with a warning or urgent alert; marks a destination as problematic or requiring attention
fa-location-exclamation.intentId: alert about an issue or hazard at a specific location; flag a map point as requiring immediate attention

fa-location-minus.appearanceId: teardrop balloon pin shape with a horizontal minus or dash line overlaid in the center body; inverted teardrop pin silhouette with a subtraction minus badge inside
fa-location-minus.functionalityId: removes or decrements a location pin or count; subtracts a point from a list of saved locations
fa-location-minus.intentId: remove a saved location or reduce a location count; delete a pinned map point from a list

fa-location-pen.appearanceId: teardrop balloon pin shape with a small pen or pencil tip shape overlaid in the center body; inverted teardrop pin silhouette with an editing pen nib badge inside
fa-location-pen.functionalityId: edits or renames a pinned location; allows modification of a saved map point or address
fa-location-pen.intentId: edit or update the details of a saved location; rename or modify a pinned map point

fa-location-pin-lock.appearanceId: teardrop balloon pin shape with a small padlock shape overlaid in the center body; inverted teardrop pin silhouette with a closed lock badge inside
fa-location-pin-lock.functionalityId: locks or restricts access to a pinned location; secures a saved map point from editing or sharing
fa-location-pin-lock.intentId: lock a location pin to prevent changes or sharing; secure access to a specific saved map point

fa-location-plus.appearanceId: teardrop balloon pin shape with a plus or cross sign overlaid in the center body; inverted teardrop pin silhouette with an addition plus badge inside
fa-location-plus.functionalityId: adds a new location pin to a map or saved list; creates a new geographic point or address entry
fa-location-plus.intentId: add or save a new location to a map or list; create a new pinned geographic point

fa-location-question.appearanceId: teardrop balloon pin shape with a question mark overlaid in the center body; inverted teardrop pin silhouette with a query question badge inside
fa-location-question.functionalityId: indicates an unknown or uncertain location; marks a map point as unverified or requiring clarification
fa-location-question.intentId: flag an unknown or uncertain geographic location; mark a map point as unverified or in need of confirmation

fa-location-slash.appearanceId: teardrop balloon pin shape with a diagonal slash line crossing through the entire pin body; inverted teardrop pin silhouette with a cancellation slash stroke overlaid
fa-location-slash.functionalityId: disables or hides a location pin; indicates location sharing or services are turned off
fa-location-slash.intentId: turn off location sharing or disable a map pin; indicate that location data is unavailable or blocked

fa-location-smile.appearanceId: teardrop balloon pin shape with a small smiley face with curved mouth and dot eyes overlaid in the center body; inverted teardrop pin silhouette with a happy face badge inside
fa-location-smile.functionalityId: marks a favorite or enjoyable location with a positive indicator; tags a map point as a liked or happy place
fa-location-smile.intentId: mark a location as a favorite or positive place; tag a map point with a good experience or recommendation

fa-location-xmark.appearanceId: teardrop balloon pin shape with an X mark or cross overlaid in the center body; inverted teardrop pin silhouette with a close or delete X badge inside
fa-location-xmark.functionalityId: removes or closes a pinned location; deletes a saved map point or clears a location marker
fa-location-xmark.intentId: delete or close a pinned location on a map; remove a specific geographic point from a list or map view

fa-lock.appearanceId: rectangular padlock body with a curved shackle or U-shaped arch closed at the top; solid lock silhouette with a semicircular shackle over a square body
fa-lock.functionalityId: locks or secures content, a file, or an account; indicates a protected or restricted resource
fa-lock.intentId: secure or restrict access to a resource; indicate that content or an account is locked and protected

fa-lock-a.appearanceId: rectangular padlock body with a closed curved shackle and a letter A overlaid or inscribed on the lock body; padlock silhouette with an uppercase A badge on the face
fa-lock-a.functionalityId: locks content or access associated with the letter A or a category labeled A; secures an A-type credential or resource
fa-lock-a.intentId: lock or secure an A-labeled category or credential; restrict access to content tagged with the letter A

fa-lock-alt.appearanceId: rectangular padlock body with a closed curved shackle in a slightly alternate or stylistic variant form; padlock silhouette with an alternate shackle or body shape compared to the standard lock
fa-lock-alt.functionalityId: provides an alternate lock or security indicator; represents a secondary lock style for access control
fa-lock-alt.intentId: indicate security or access restriction using an alternate lock style; apply a secondary lock visual to a protected resource

fa-lock-hashtag.appearanceId: rectangular padlock body with a closed curved shackle and a hashtag symbol overlaid on the lock face; padlock silhouette with a pound or hash sign badge on the body
fa-lock-hashtag.functionalityId: locks a channel, topic, or resource identified by a hashtag; secures access to a hash-tagged category or channel
fa-lock-hashtag.intentId: lock or restrict a specific tagged channel or topic; secure a resource identified by a hashtag identifier

fa-lock-open.appearanceId: rectangular padlock body with the shackle or U-arch open and raised off the top of the body; padlock silhouette with an unlatched open shackle pivoted to one side above the lock body
fa-lock-open.functionalityId: unlocks or grants access to a secured resource; indicates that a lock is disengaged or access is permitted
fa-lock-open.intentId: unlock or open access to a protected resource; indicate that a lock is disengaged and content is accessible

fa-lock-open-alt.appearanceId: rectangular padlock body with an open raised shackle in an alternate stylistic variant; open padlock silhouette with a pivoted shackle in a slightly different position or body shape
fa-lock-open-alt.functionalityId: provides an alternate visual for an unlocked or open security state; represents secondary unlocked access indication
fa-lock-open-alt.intentId: indicate an unlocked state using an alternate open-lock style; display a secondary unlocked resource or access indicator

fa-locust.appearanceId: a side-profile insect shape with segmented body, large hind legs, and visible wings; grasshopper or locust silhouette with elongated abdomen and prominent jumping legs
fa-locust.functionalityId: represents a locust insect or pest infestation; marks agricultural or environmental content related to locust swarms
fa-locust.intentId: report or track a locust swarm or crop pest event; indicate an agricultural infestation or pest control situation

fa-lollipop.appearanceId: a circular candy head on a thin straight stick handle; round lollipop silhouette with a uniform disk top and a narrow vertical stem
fa-lollipop.functionalityId: marks a candy, treat, or confectionery item in a food app; represents a sweet or dessert category
fa-lollipop.intentId: browse candy or sweet treat options; select a confectionery item in a food or party planning app

fa-loveseat.appearanceId: a small two-seat sofa silhouette with a continuous backrest, two cushions, and armrests on both sides; compact settee outline with a divided seat and curved arm ends
fa-loveseat.functionalityId: represents a loveseat or two-person sofa in a furniture catalog; marks a seating category in an interior design app
fa-loveseat.intentId: browse or select loveseat furniture in a home decor or shopping app; identify a two-seat sofa in an interior design catalog

fa-low-vision.appearanceId: an eye shape with partial obscuring lines or reduced visibility indication, or an eye with a tilted or angled view suggesting impaired sight; eye silhouette with accessibility impairment marks
fa-low-vision.functionalityId: indicates low vision or visual impairment accessibility needs; activates or marks low-vision accessibility settings
fa-low-vision.intentId: enable or indicate low-vision accessibility accommodations; flag a user as having visual impairment for interface adaptation

fa-luchador.appearanceId: a stylized wrestling mask face shape with cutout eye holes and a decorative nose and chin guard; lucha libre mask silhouette with eye openings and ornate facial panel detailing
fa-luchador.functionalityId: represents a luchador wrestler or Mexican lucha libre sport; marks a wrestling or sports entertainment category
fa-luchador.intentId: access wrestling or lucha libre sports content; identify a luchador character or wrestling entertainment category

fa-luggage-cart.appearanceId: a wheeled cart frame with a handle bar at the top and two or three stacked rectangular bag shapes on the platform; baggage trolley silhouette with a vertical stack of suitcases on a rolling base
fa-luggage-cart.functionalityId: represents a luggage cart or baggage trolley at a travel facility; indicates baggage handling or transport services
fa-luggage-cart.intentId: find or request a luggage cart at a hotel or airport; manage baggage transport in a travel or hospitality app

fa-lungs.appearanceId: a pair of symmetrical lung lobe shapes with branching bronchial tree lines inside; bilateral lung silhouette with internal airway branch structures
fa-lungs.functionalityId: represents the lungs or respiratory system in a medical or health app; indicates breathing or pulmonary function data
fa-lungs.intentId: view or monitor lung health or respiratory data; access pulmonary or breathing-related medical information

fa-lungs-virus.appearanceId: a pair of symmetrical lung shapes with a small spiky virus particle overlaid in the center or on one lobe; bilateral lung silhouette with a circular spiked viral body badge
fa-lungs-virus.functionalityId: indicates a lung infection or respiratory viral illness; marks a pulmonary condition related to a viral pathogen
fa-lungs-virus.intentId: report or track a viral respiratory infection or lung disease; identify pulmonary complications associated with a virus

fa-m.appearanceId: a single uppercase or lowercase letter M as a plain sans-serif or serif letterform; two-peaked letter glyph representing the thirteenth letter of the alphabet
fa-m.functionalityId: represents the letter M as a label or initial; marks a category or item starting with the letter M
fa-m.intentId: label or categorize content starting with M; use the letter M as a shorthand or identifier

fa-mace.appearanceId: a medieval weapon silhouette with a long handle and a spiked spherical or flanged head at the top; staff and spiked ball weapon outline with radiating spikes or flanges around the head
fa-mace.functionalityId: represents a medieval mace weapon in a game or historical context; marks a combat or armory category
fa-mace.intentId: access medieval weapons or combat equipment in a game or historical app; select a mace weapon in an armory or fantasy setting

fa-magic.appearanceId: a magic wand stick with a star or sparkle burst at the tip; thin rod or wand silhouette with a starburst or star shape at one end
fa-magic.functionalityId: applies an automatic enhancement or magic transformation; activates a smart or one-click improvement feature
fa-magic.intentId: apply automatic enhancements or creative effects; use a one-click smart improvement feature in an editor or app

fa-magic-wand-sparkles.appearanceId: a magic wand stick with multiple small sparkle or star shapes scattered around the tip and along the shaft; wand silhouette with radiating sparkle glints or star bursts
fa-magic-wand-sparkles.functionalityId: applies AI-powered or automated creative enhancements; activates a smart magic transformation with sparkle effects
fa-magic-wand-sparkles.intentId: apply AI or magic-powered automatic enhancements to content; activate a creative smart-transform feature in an editor

fa-magnet.appearanceId: a horseshoe or U-shaped magnet silhouette with two pole ends at the bottom of the curved arms; curved arch magnet outline with two opposing tips at the base
fa-magnet.functionalityId: represents magnetic attraction or a pull effect; indicates a feature that draws, attracts, or attaches items together
fa-magnet.intentId: indicate magnetic attraction or a drag-and-snap feature; use a magnet metaphor for attracting or connecting related items

fa-magnifying-glass-arrow-right.appearanceId: circular magnifying glass lens with a handle and a right-pointing arrow overlaid inside the lens circle; search glass silhouette with a rightward directional arrow badge within the lens
fa-magnifying-glass-arrow-right.functionalityId: searches in a rightward or forward direction; navigates to the next search result or page
fa-magnifying-glass-arrow-right.intentId: advance to the next search result or navigate forward in a search; find and move to the next matching item

fa-magnifying-glass-arrows-rotate.appearanceId: circular magnifying glass lens with a handle and two rotating curved arrows forming a cycle inside the lens circle; search glass silhouette with a circular rotation or refresh arrow badge within the lens
fa-magnifying-glass-arrows-rotate.functionalityId: refreshes or re-runs a search query; rotates or cycles through search results
fa-magnifying-glass-arrows-rotate.intentId: refresh a search or re-execute a query; cycle through or rotate search results

fa-magnifying-glass-chart.appearanceId: circular magnifying glass lens with a handle and a small bar chart or graph shape overlaid inside the lens circle; search glass silhouette with a bar chart analytics badge within the lens
fa-magnifying-glass-chart.functionalityId: searches through analytics data or charts; examines a chart or graph in detail
fa-magnifying-glass-chart.intentId: search or analyze chart data; examine analytics graphs in a data visualization tool

fa-magnifying-glass-music.appearanceId: circular magnifying glass lens with a handle and a musical note shape overlaid inside the lens circle; search glass silhouette with a single or double music note badge within the lens
fa-magnifying-glass-music.functionalityId: searches for music tracks, songs, or audio content; finds a specific piece of music in a library
fa-magnifying-glass-music.intentId: search for music or audio content in a library or streaming app; find a specific song, track, or musical piece

fa-magnifying-glass-play.appearanceId: circular magnifying glass lens with a handle and a triangular play button shape overlaid inside the lens circle; search glass silhouette with a right-pointing play triangle badge within the lens
fa-magnifying-glass-play.functionalityId: searches for and plays video or audio content; previews or plays a media item directly from search results
fa-magnifying-glass-play.intentId: find and play a video or audio item from search results; preview media content directly in a search interface

fa-magnifying-glass-waveform.appearanceId: circular magnifying glass lens with a handle and a wavy audio waveform line overlaid inside the lens circle; search glass silhouette with a sinusoidal or jagged waveform badge within the lens
fa-magnifying-glass-waveform.functionalityId: searches through audio waveform or sound data; analyzes or inspects an audio signal in detail
fa-magnifying-glass-waveform.intentId: search or analyze audio waveform data; inspect a sound signal or audio recording in a waveform view

fa-mail-bulk.appearanceId: multiple overlapping envelope shapes stacked together forming a pile or batch; a cluster of envelope silhouettes arranged as a group or mass mailing stack
fa-mail-bulk.functionalityId: sends or manages bulk email or mass mailings; represents a batch of messages or a mailing list
fa-mail-bulk.intentId: send bulk emails or manage a mass mailing campaign; handle a large batch of outgoing messages

fa-mailbox.appearanceId: a cylindrical or rounded rectangular mailbox body on a post with a small slot opening and a flag on the side; roadside letter box silhouette with a delivery slot and a side flag indicator
fa-mailbox.functionalityId: represents a physical mailbox or postal delivery point; indicates incoming mail or a postal address
fa-mailbox.intentId: check or manage a physical mailbox or postal delivery; indicate a postal address or mail delivery location

fa-mailbox-flag-up.appearanceId: a cylindrical or rounded rectangular mailbox body on a post with the side flag raised upward in the up position; roadside letter box silhouette with an upright raised flag indicator
fa-mailbox-flag-up.functionalityId: indicates outgoing mail is ready for pickup or the mailbox flag is raised; signals that mail has been deposited for collection
fa-mailbox-flag-up.intentId: signal that outgoing mail is ready for postal pickup; indicate mail has been placed in a mailbox for collection

fa-maki-roll.appearanceId: a cylindrical sushi roll cross-section shape with a circular outline and inner rice and filling layers; maki sushi slice silhouette with concentric ring layers showing nori, rice, and a center filling
fa-maki-roll.functionalityId: represents a maki sushi roll or Japanese food item; marks a sushi or Japanese cuisine category in a food app
fa-maki-roll.intentId: browse or order maki sushi or Japanese food options; identify a sushi roll item in a restaurant or food delivery app

fa-male.appearanceId: a standing human figure silhouette with a circular head and simplified body suggesting a male person; upright person outline with a round head on a straight-limbed figure
fa-male.functionalityId: represents a male person or gender indicator; marks a male demographic or restroom designation
fa-male.intentId: indicate a male person, gender option, or restroom; label a male demographic category in a form or directory

fa-manat-sign.appearanceId: a stylized Azerbaijani manat currency symbol consisting of a letter m-like glyph with two horizontal strikethrough bars; currency sign with a rounded m-form and dual parallel crossbars
fa-manat-sign.functionalityId: displays or selects the Azerbaijani manat as the currency; represents a price or monetary value in AZN
fa-manat-sign.intentId: work with Azerbaijani manat pricing or currency conversion; display or set an AZN monetary value

fa-mandolin.appearanceId: a teardrop or pear-shaped stringed instrument body with a neck, tuning pegs, and strings running along the neck and body; mandolin silhouette with a rounded lower bout, narrow neck, and multiple strings
fa-mandolin.functionalityId: represents a mandolin instrument in a music app or catalog; marks a stringed instrument category for music content
fa-mandolin.intentId: browse or select mandolin or folk music content; identify a mandolin instrument in a music catalog or store
